description: Seed gold set for retrieval/report eval. Extend with your own annotated Q/A over your filings. Each item: a question + the company it concerns + keywords that should appear in a correct grounded answer.

retrieval.q: What are NVIDIA's most recent revenue trends?
Coherent optical/networking segment and AI demand
Lumentum EML laser capacity and orders

report_rubric: Thesis stated in the first section
Bull and bear cases both present
Every numeric claim carries a [n] citation
